title: SEASONAL FOOD BOXES - 211info
text: CONSEJO HISPANO SEASONAL FOOD BOXES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific food boxes including fresh produce, dried and canned goods, with a focus on Latinx community members. 565 12th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: December-February Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-4547 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information, a small intake form is required at pick up. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, Tillamook, and Pacific Counties SITE HOURS: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm In-person: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Services: Food Pantries Food Pantries * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - DOCUMENT ASSISTANCE AND NOTARY PUBLIC MUTUAL SUPPORT - MUJERES APOYANDO MUJERES TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - ECONOMIC EMPOWERMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONSEJO HISPANO
